column1: Note: In 1950 and 1960, the only race/ethnicity categories on the Census were White, Black, and Other. Two or more races became an option in 2000.
Source: U.S. Census Bureau, 1950-2010 Decennial Censuses, IPUMS-NHGIS, University of Minnesota, www.nhgis.org; 2020 and 2025 City of Boston Planning Department Research Division estimates
